news.title: Warsh promises inflation will be a 'thing of the past,' cites 'mistake' of prior policy
news.summary: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.

news.title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
news.summary: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago. The Consumer Price Index is a measure of inflation in the United States.

news.title: IBM stock craters 23% after issuing second-quarter earnings warning
news.summary: CEO blamed shortfall on weakness in the software and infrastructure business because clients shifted money toward hardware purchases. CEO blamed the shortfall on weaknesses in theSoftware and Infrastructure business.

news.title: Sen. Tim Scott wants to hear from Warsh on data centers and artificial intelligence
news.summary: Sen. Tim Scott, R-S.C., will host Kevin Warsh before the Senate Banking Committee on Wednesday. It will be Warsh's first time testifying as Fed chairman.

news.title: Google DeepMind chief Demis Hassabis calls for U.S. to spearhead AI standards body
news.summary: Tech giant's AI boss said "urgent action" was needed as AI capabilities advanced. Tech giant's CEO said 'urgent' action was needed to improve AI capabilities.

news.title: IBM’s stock is having its worst day ever after the surprise release of an earnings miss
news.summary: IBM's profit and revenue were well below expectations. IBM’s stock plunges after a preliminary release of profit and revenues that were wellbelow expectations.

news.title: Jamie Dimon says ‘booming’ markets and a ‘fine’ consumer fueled JPMorgan’s blowout profits
news.summary: JPMorgan blew past earnings expectations for the second quarter. CEO Jamie Dimon said markets are booming. Dimon: "We're in a great position to continue to grow and expand our business"

news.title: Social Security says it’s handling disability claims better. But it may just be pushing more people  away.
news.summary: The rate of denials has increased in disability cases, research shows. The rate ofDenial: The Rate of Denials has Increased in Disability cases, Research shows.

news.title: Bank of America’s stock reverses premarket decline in wake of blockbuster earnings report
news.summary: The bank handily beat Wall Street’s expectations. Investors initially appeared to be “selling the news” after the bank beat expectations.

news.title: Why SpaceX and Tesla are ‘value’ stocks, according to this fund manager
news.summary: Tesla and SpaceX may be winners in the next evolution of value investing, says Tsai Capital president and chief investment officer, Christopher Tsai.
